nika check · the pre-flight audit
Audited before a single token.
signature-demo.nika.yaml rc=0 · 1 hint
$ nika check signature-demo.nika.yaml nika check · signature-demo.nika.yaml ✔ PLAN 8 waves · 9 tasks · max parallelism 2 wave 1 discover (invoke · nika:glob) wave 2 digest (exec · cat) · stats (invoke · nika:jq) wave 3 draft (infer · mock/echo) wave 4 translate (infer · mock/echo) wave 5 survivors (invoke · nika:jq) wave 6 verify (agent · mock/echo) wave 7 publish (exec · printf) wave 8 report (infer · mock/echo) ✔ MODELS 1 model resolves in this binary ⚠ COST $0.0000 – $0.0000 FLOOR (unbounded tasks present) draft mock/echo UNBOUNDED — no catalog price (local/unknown model) translate mock/echo UNBOUNDED — no catalog price (local/unknown model) verify mock/echo UNBOUNDED — no catalog price (local/unknown model) report mock/echo UNBOUNDED — no catalog price (local/unknown model) ✔ SECRETS no information-flow escapes ✔ TYPES every deep output reference fits its declared shape ✔ TOOLS every nika: tool names a canonical builtin ✔ ARGS every invoke arg key is declared + every required arg is present ✔ SCHEMA every authored schema: is satisfiable ✔ GATES every task is statically reachable · status literals in vocabulary ○ PERMITS no boundary declared (engine floor only) · `--infer-permits` writes one ↳ HINT [permits] no `permits:` boundary declared — run `nika check --infer-permits` to generate the tightest one (default-deny once present) ↳ HINT [native-first] native-first/002 · `cat` is file plumbing — `nika:read`/`nika:write` (`create_dirs: true` replaces mkdir) / `nika:glob` cover it inside the permits.fs boundary (no subprocess) ✔ audited · 9 tasks · 8 waves · permits none · est ≥$0.0000 · 2 hints wave 1 · discover wave 2 · digest · stats wave 3 · draft wave 4 · translate wave 5 · survivors wave 6 · verify wave 7 · publish wave 8 · report
nika 0.93.1 · real cli output · mock model · offline · 100-col pty nika.sh 🦋
